title: Fix deployment configuration and build issues for Internet Computer network

requirements.text: Review and update dfx.json configuration to ensure proper canister settings for Internet Computer deployment, including correct canister types, build commands, and dependency declarations

quotes: Update deployment configuration: modify thhe dfx.json or deployment settings if there are configuration issues

acceptanceCriteria: dfx.json contains valid canister configurations for both frontend and backend
All canister type declarations are correct for Internet Computer deployment
Build commands and dependencies are properly specified
Configuration passes dfx validation without errors

requirements.text: Fix any TypeScript compilation errors, missing dependencies, or module resolution issues in the frontend code that could prevent successful build or deployment

quotes: Fix code that prevents deployment: If there are build errors or code issues blocking deployment, address those

requirements.text: Ensure html2canvas dependency is properly declared in package.json with correct version specification to support PNG export functionality
acceptanceCriteria: html2canvas is listed in package.json dependencies
Package version is compatible with the project
Dependency installs without errors during npm install

requirements.text: Verify backend Motoko code compiles successfully and fix any syntax errors, type mismatches, or compilation issues in main.mo that could block deployment

quotes: Fix code that prevents deployment: If there are build errors or code issues blocking deployment, address those

acceptanceCriteria: Backend Motoko code compiles without errors

requirements.text: Ensure all frontend asset paths and imports reference valid files and that no broken imports or missing asset references exist that could cause deployment failures
acceptanceCriteria: All import statements reference existing files
Asset paths in components point to valid resources
No 404 errors for missing resources during build
Static assets are properly included in build output

constraints: Maintain single-actor Motoko architecture in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui/*
Preserve existing Internet Identity authentication implementation
Keep all existing attack path visualizer functionality intact
Do not change the backend schema or data structures for diagram storage
nonGoals: Adding new features or functionality beyond deployment fixes
Modifying existing UI components or visual styling
Migrating to different frameworks or technologies
